name: Wedlock Blossom
address: First Floor, Wedlock Blossom, 102, below Sky Kitchen & Vendantu Classes, near Petrol pump, Vittalvadi, Hingne Khurd, Pune, Maharashtra 411051
full_address: First Floor, Wedlock Blossom, 102, below Sky Kitchen & Vendantu Classes, near Petrol pump, Vittalvadi, Hingne Khurd, Pune, Maharashtra 411051

reviews.text:
Amazing Experience! Perfect Baby and Maternity Photos!

I cannot recommend Wedlock Blossom enough for their incredible work in capturing the most precious moments of my baby! From start to finish, the experience was seamless and professional. The photographers Supriya nad Tejas were so patient and skilled at working with infants, making sure my little one was comfortable and happy throughout the session.

The attention to detail was outstanding—from the adorable props to the perfect lighting, every shot was beautifully composed. They truly captured my baby’s personality and those tiny, fleeting details that I never want to forget.

The final photos were beyond my expectations! The quality, clarity, and creativity in each image were stunning. I’m so grateful to have these memories preserved so beautifully.

If you’re looking for a photo studio that delivers exceptional baby photos, look no further than Wedlock Blossom. They are worth every penny! Thank you for giving us timeless treasures we’ll cherish forever!

The photography studio and crew were exceptional and incredibly accommodating throughout our two-day wedding ceremonies. With the bride and her family being international and new to Hindu traditions, the team's thoughtful explanations of each scene, pose, and ritual were immensely appreciated. They maintained impeccable coordination, capturing beautiful moments while respecting our ritual timelines. Both the pictures and video were of outstanding quality, expertly crafted to appeal to both the Indian and non-Indian sides of our family. Highly recommended for anyone looking for professional, thoughtful, and high-quality wedding photography and videography!

Easily the best experience! Wedlock Blossom has created unforgettable memories of our special day. They have captured every little detail of our wedding and put together an engaging video and amazing photos that we keep going back to. The work has been appreciated by everyone in the family.
I will not hesitate to recommend Wedlock Blossom to anyone who is looking to create a truly candid and precious memory of their Big Day!
Huge Thanks to Tejas Shelke & his team at Wedlock Blossom!

We had the pleasure of working with Wedlock Blossom, a truly talented baby shower photographer. Captured every emotion and moment beautifully.  We couldn't be happier with the final photos. If you want a photographer who truly captures the essence of your special day, Wedlock Blossom is the one. Highly recommended! with Wedlock Blossoms as our baby shower photographer was an absolute delight and a decision we'll forever cherish.

Wedblock Blossom truly exceeded all our expectations! Their eye for detail and ability to capture raw emotions is absolutely magical. Every photograph feels like a beautiful story frozen in time. The team is incredibly professional, warm, and effortless to work with. Thanks to Wedblock Blossom, we now have memories we’ll cherish forever. Highly recommended to anyone looking for breathtaking, heartfelt photography!! ✨✨

I got to know Tejas and the wedlock team from my husband's friend. Tejas is super professional, reliable and an excellent photographer. I never imagined how good the cinematic video for our wedding will turn out. I would say that the wedlock team gave us more than what we expected. Memories made right with Wedlock Blossom.
Highly recommend.

It was a stunning experience with Wedlock Blossom team.
Very much affordable, classy equipments, photographers with great calibre.
The pictures are beautifully clicked and the videos are well edited and are presented in a unique style everytime.
Must definitely opt if you are looking to capture and make your memorable day worth remembering!

Absolutely loved the experience and would highly recomment to everyone!
